name: oat-tools
description: Owen's Applied Thinking — content production commands for VS Code

commands.title: OAT: Promote All Tables in Document

oat.workerUrl.description: Cloudflare Worker URL for OAT table promotion (creates Google Sheet, returns embed data).

oat.imageStagingSheetId.description: Google Sheet ID for image staging. Share with oat-tools@oat-tools-owen.iam.gserviceaccount.com.

oat.imagesRepoPath.description: Absolute path to the local images repo. Defaults to ~/dev/images.

oat.screenshotScriptPath.description: Absolute path to screenshot-html.sh. Defaults to scripts/screenshot-html.sh in this extension if present, then ~/dev/wraith/scripts/screenshot-html.sh.

oat.unsplashAccessKey.description: Unsplash API Access Key for thumbnail previews in the Image Staging panel.
